transcript:
CALLER: Hello. Mujhe ek haematologist se milna hai. Mere blood reports mein kuch abnormal aaya hai — platelet count related.
AGENT: Zaroor, yeh important hai. Aapka naam aur number?
CALLER: Swapnil Ghate. 9765234890.
AGENT: Shukriya Swapnil ji. Humare haematologist Dr. Arun Pendse hain. Unka clinic schedule Mangalvaar aur Shukravaar hai. Kaunsa din theek hai?
CALLER: Shukravaar — kal — agar slot ho toh urgent basis pe.
AGENT: Kal Shukravaar 11 AM ka slot hai. Aur abnormal reports ke case mein hum ise priority mein mark kar lete hain. Aap apni reports saath laana zaroor.
CALLER: Haan, sab reports hain mere paas. Book kar dijiye please.
AGENT: Done! Swapnil Ghate, kal Shukravaar 11 AM, Dr. Arun Pendse. Jaldi se report milegi aapko.
